title: Lab 37: Services and Default Target
description: Control the default boot target and manage system services in a persistent way

tasks: Configure clientvm to boot into multi-user.target by default.
Ensure the rsyslog service is enabled and running.
If postfix is installed, disable it and stop it.
hints: Use systemctl for both target and service management.
solution_outline: Make the target and service changes persistent.
task_titles: Configure clientvm to boot into multi-user.target...
Ensure the rsyslog service is enabled and running
If postfix is installed, disable it and stop it
